channel.title: Create FortiManager VM :: SE How-To Build Lab
channel.description: Deploy FortiManager VM from Terminal in OOB ​ from Terminal in OOB cd /home/fortinet/automation/ansible/fortinet ​ from Terminal in OOB ./create-vm.sh ../vars/all-hosts.yml <PVE server name> fmg v7.6.6.M ​ from Terminal in OOB ./start_remove_vm.sh ../vars/all-hosts.yml <PVE server name> fmg started
